notes: ALL 8 AU-eligible packages are complete (2-page PDF + cover letter in each pipeline folder). All submit-by dates have passed (8–16 days overdue). Day 18 of 30 — submit today. Quantium: quantium.com/careers; Capital.com: careers.capital.com; Kogan.com: jobs.lever.co/kogan; Qualitas: qualitas.com.au/careers (requires short note — cover letter doubles as it); Melbourne Water: melbournewater.com.au/careers; AGL: agl.com.au/careers; UniSuper: unisuper.com.au/careers (confirm company name); AVC: avc.com.au/careers (confirm displayed title).
